case_title: CA VISUAL RESOURCE, INC. VS. IDEX GLOBAL SERVICES, INC., A CORP. et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CA VISUAL RESOURCE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT IDEX GLOBAL SERVICES, INC., A CORP. EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT IDEX GLOBAL SERVICES, INC., A CORP.
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $143.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT IDEX GLOBAL SERVICES, INC., A CORP.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 20

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED (BY SERVING LANCE CATAROZOLI, VICE PRESIDENT) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CA VISUAL RESOURCE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT IDEX GLOBAL SERVICES, INC., A CORP. OEX HEARING SET FOR JUN-19-2002 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 610
STATUS CONFERENCE OF APR-26-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT ENTERED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT IDEX GLOBAL SERVICES, INC., A CORP.
